alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites must comply with Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella (special guarantees for trade)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. For trade of certain live animals and products into Sweden, Finland, and Norway, special guarantees regarding Salmonella prevalence and control programs must be met, as laid down in specific Council Decisions and Regulations. Other EU countries can obtain similar guarantees if their control program is recognized as equivalent.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation sets microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients. Specific limits must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Manual review required. Automated extraction failed: {"error":{"code":503,"message":"This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.","status":"UNAVAILABLE"}}

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: All food businesses must comply with regulatory limits. New: Must have technological justification and not present health risks. Criteria for allowing food additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Regulatory limits on food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply. Applies to all food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Unpermitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell. If a food product contains an additive that is not permitted.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. General requirement for all food sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Do not import or sell. New: Do not import or sell. If laboratory test results indicate contaminants exceed limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Regulatory limits for contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply. Food businesses must comply with both additive and contaminant limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Regulatory limits on incidental constituents (contaminants)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply. Applies to all food businesses.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues (diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Prohibition under Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in list of ingredients on food labels. Applies only to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. These are mandatory allergens requiring labeling.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite as residue sulphur dioxide
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10 or more. Mandatory declaration if the concentration meets or exceeds the limit.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition from production, import, or sale. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The nine major food allergens recognized by U.S. law are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. Sesame was added as the 9th major allergen effective January 1, 2023, by the FASTER Act.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. Guidance Level for 3-MCPD in acid-hydrolyzed protein and Asian-style sauces.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. Action Level for total aflatoxins in general foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. Action Level for total aflatoxins in peanuts and peanut products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Chemical contaminants (tolerances, action levels, guidance levels)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Contaminant levels are published in various guidance documents and regulations for industry. Tolerances and action levels are defined in 21 CFR parts 109 and 509. The Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool provides a consolidated list.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Color additives made from cochineal extract and carmine, identified as allergenic substances, must be declared on the label of all food and cosmetic products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. All products containing FD&C Yellow No. 5 must identify it on their labels due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The food source of all major food allergens must be declared. This can be done in parentheses following the ingredient name (e.g., 'lecithin (soy)') or immediately after or next to the list of ingredients in a 'contains' statement (e.g., 'Contains wheat, milk, and soy.'). The type of tree nut, species of fish, and species of Crustacean shellfish must also be declared.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of sulfiting agents
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: ≥10. New: 10. Various sulfiting agents must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration in the food is equal to or greater than 10 parts per million total sulfites.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-free claim definition
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The FDA issued a final rule defining 'gluten-free' for food labeling. On August 12, 2020, compliance requirements were established for fermented and hydrolyzed foods, or foods that contain fermented or hydrolyzed ingredients, bearing the 'gluten-free' claim.

alerts.title: Added: Vietnam Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations for allergen declaration requirements in seasoning, snack food, and processed foods must be verified through official government sources.

alerts.title: Added: China Additive Limits - Specific food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This standard specifies the varieties, scope of use, and maximum dosages of food additives. Specific limits must be verified by consulting the full document.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth conditions for permitted food additives in all foods. Provisions are available in a searchable online database.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (general)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) for contaminants in food or feed commodities, representing the maximum concentration legally permitted to protect human health.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and Toxins
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Refer to the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) for specific maximum levels.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Refer to the Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices (CXC 78-2017).

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants
alerts.details: Old: Maximum levels (MLs). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) and General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: Old: Adherence to Code of Practice for prevention and reduction. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food additives must be approved for use in the EU and comply with their conditions of use as listed in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes (shelf-life studies, sampling)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. For Ready-To-Eat (RTE) foods, shelf-life studies (durability studies and challenge tests) for Listeria monocytogenes must be conducted according to technical guidance, and sampling procedures for L. monocytogenes in processing areas and equipment must follow guidelines to comply with food safety criteria in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Process hygiene criteria
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Process hygiene criteria must be met to indicate the correct functioning of the production process, as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Declaration of allergens on prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for allergen declaration, including the list of mandatory allergens and their presentation on labels, are expected to be detailed within this technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation sets out the general mandatory labelling requirements for all prepackaged foodstuffs in the GCC region. Specific details on content, format, and mandatory information must be verified from the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation outlines the general requirements for food to be considered Halal, which impacts ingredients, processing, and potentially labelling claims. Specific details must be verified from the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods for food products
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for various food products. Compliance requires verification of the specific product category and its corresponding mandatory shelf life from the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Salt / Sodium Limits - Declaration of sodium content on prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Nutritional information, including the declaration of sodium content, is typically a mandatory component of prepackaged food labels as per general labelling regulations. Specific requirements must be verified from the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Labelling requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies labelling requirements for prepackaged food stuffs. Specific requirements must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory expiration dates for food products. Specific requirements must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additive limits
